7份。然后每个月安排宗门弟子比试前多少名可以获得主角特别制作的美食这样又不和前面冲突还能继续宗门弟子的勤奋修练。这些就是我想给作者的建议希望作者可以考虑考虑[微笑][微笑][微笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1667534463,"group_id":"7147966849165036578","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"自在如斯，一人一景一段情，余生无悔，彼岸无殇。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/93OoxB/G2mHpxF15KMqOY=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a84d06c48dcf4fad80b9e762574e1286~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704438&x-signature=oF7W6HLIJfpZJWlDXAGlFYxxRvI%3D","user_id":"580142797430157","user_name":"凉辰梦瑾唯你"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"580142797430157","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7147966849165036578","book_info":{"abstract":"一个厨子穿越玄幻世界，觉醒了一个最强厨神系统。
做出的菜品获得他人好评，就能提升天赋，根骨，悟性。
好家伙，直接原地起飞了。
而且，做出的菜品还有特殊功效，能增强肉身，温养身体，清除暗伤.............
整个宗门都沸腾了。
上至老祖，太上长老，宗主，下至杂役弟子，都为了这一口吃的而陷入了疯狂。
宗主，“我是宗主，理应由我来吃这第一口。”
老祖“滚犊子，我都没几年好活了，想吃口东西有错？”
众弟子“饭点到了，兄弟们冲啊。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/55a75512d63bca24390fa62a96425cbb","author":"九语","author_id":"","book_id":"7147966849165036578","book_name":"厨神，妖兽：不好，我们成食材了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"17万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7148015489254752803","read_count":"169151","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"5847965"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"2811","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,美食,架空,东方玄幻,无脑爽,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/33141ebc7ee6af51e728f741139c33bd~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779364044&x-signature=mCBUF9elOo%2FawweC4E1c83aUALM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_inf
